ID,Pre-requisites,,,,
,User status,Notice Period,Available Date/Time,Expected Outcome,
B8-1,Verified,5,Today and tomorrow only,User should NOT be able to See the available dates of today or tomorrow,

Logic:,,,,,
"Merchants may require a notice period to prepare for the influencer's arrival, and hence if the notice period is set at X days, that is the minimum required amount of time before any booking is made available",,,,,
